text:
ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn＜TFSv＞ is the 15th and final track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack 02, as well as the 15th and final track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by , and released six days early on June 16, 2022.

Title

"ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn" is an approximate phonetic transcription of "Attack on Titan". "TFSv" is an abbreviation of "The Final Season version".

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn.

All occurrences

Episode 87 - The Rumbling arrives in Marley as the Global Allied Fleet is destroyed
Special 1 and Episode 90 - The airship unit is shot down by the Beast Titan
Special 2 and Episode 92 - Levi beheads Zeke, stopping the Rumbling. Jean moves in to detonate the explosives
